name: Josh Durey
description: AI-evaluation, LLM-quality, and red-team specialist. Reproducible cross-model audits and the harnesses behind them.
heroHeadline: I evaluate and red-team frontier AI — and ship the harnesses to prove it.
heroLede: AI-evaluation and LLM-quality specialist. I design adversarial evals that catch real failure modes across models under identical live conditions, then turn the results into reproducible, citable audits.
thesis: Most "multi-model evaluations" run models one at a time and compare notes after. The failures that matter only surface when every model faces the *same* input at the *same* moment — behavioral ordering under identical live conditions. That **structural simultaneity** is what I build for, and it's the difference between an anecdote and an audit.
